tree.name: Bilal Coulibaly
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team Beal trade: WAS traded Jarace Walker (#8) and a 2029 2nd round pick to IND. IND traded Bilal Coulibaly (#7) to WAS. PHX also sent Chris Paul, Shamet, picks to WAS for Beal.
tree.note: WAS drafted Walker at #8, swapped with IND to move up one spot for Coulibaly at #7.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jarace Walker
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted #8 overall by WAS, immediately traded to IND for Coulibaly (#7).

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to Indiana as part of the Coulibaly/Walker swap in the Beal 3-team trade.
